scene_summary: A glass-domed nocturnal memory conservatory with a central labeled profile monolith, root-like ceiling canopy, brass control lever, rain curtain, clock basin, tool tray, prompt loom, drawer cabinet, seed/vault displays, terrarium, and deletion reliquary. Many objects have readable brass placards and clear containment or display surfaces suitable for interaction mapping.
usable_surfaces: central frosted user profile monolith face with stacked memory labels
semantic root canopy overhead and its hanging placard
background extraction rain curtain sign and droplet field
brass hot-path lever assembly and priority-route base label
memory tool reliquary tray with instruments
procedural prompt loom with woven ribbon surface
LangMem source seed cabinet with amber capsule tray
episodic seed vault label and capsule cluster
collection terrarium glass case with floating tags
conservative deletion glass reliquary and placard

detected_objects.label: User Profile Core / Profile Monolith
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large central frosted crystalline monolith with readable header 'USER PROFILE CORE' and rows of profile/memory fields.

detected_objects.label: Semantic Root Canopy
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Dense branching root network spans the ceiling with glowing node bulbs; adjacent placard reads '2. SEMANTIC ROOT CANOPY'.

detected_objects.label: Semantic Root Canopy Placard
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Black-and-gold hanging sign clearly labeled '2. SEMANTIC ROOT CANOPY' with smaller descriptive lines.

detected_objects.label: Background Extraction Rain Curtain
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Vertical strands of suspended water droplets under the 'BACKGROUND EXTRACTION' placard on the left side.

detected_objects.label: Background Extraction Placard
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Left hanging sign reads '4. BACKGROUND EXTRACTION' and 'Rain Curtain'.

detected_objects.label: Hot-Path Lever
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Prominent brass lever mechanism with gauge wheel, handle, and base labeled for priority route.

detected_objects.label: Hot-Path Lever Placard
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Small black sign above the lever reads '3. HOT-PATH LEVER'.

detected_objects.label: Delayed Processing Clock Basin
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large circular basin at lower left with clock markings, rings, and rippling water.
